title: Limited 90 Day Warranty Terms and Conditions
summary: This section covers the 90-day limited warranty provided by Harbor Freight Tools Co. for the Vulcan OmniPro 220. It details what is and is not covered, the process for making a warranty claim, and the remedies available to the purchaser.
key_facts: The product is warranted free from defects in materials and workmanship for 90 days from purchase date.
The warranty applies only to the original purchaser.
Damage from misuse, abuse, negligence, or accidents is not covered.
Repairs or alterations outside Harbor Freight facilities void the warranty.
Normal wear and tear and lack of maintenance are excluded from coverage.
Harbor Freight is not liable for death, personal injury, or property damage from product use.
The product must be returned with transportation charges prepaid to claim warranty.
Proof of purchase date and explanation of complaint must accompany the returned merchandise.
Harbor Freight may repair, replace, or refund the purchase price at their election.
Repaired products will be returned to the customer at Harbor Freight's expense.
If no defect is found, the customer bears the cost of returning the product.
This warranty is expressly in lieu of all other warranties, express or implied.
procedure_steps: 1. Prepare proof of purchase date and a written explanation of the complaint.
2. Return the product or part to Harbor Freight with transportation charges prepaid.
3. Include proof of purchase date and complaint explanation with the merchandise.
4. Await inspection by Harbor Freight to verify the defect.
5. Harbor Freight will repair, replace, or refund the product at their election if defect is verified.
warnings: THIS WARRANTY IS EXPRESSLY IN LIEU OF ALL OTHER WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS.
We shall in no event be liable for death, injuries to persons or property, or for incidental, contingent, special or consequential damages arising from the use of our product.
